name: Absorbing Man
ability: On Reveal: If the last card you played has an On Reveal ability, this card copies it.

name: Adam Warlock
ability: At the end of each turn, if you are winning this location, draw a card.

name: Aero
ability: On Reveal: Move all enemy cards played this turn to this location.

name: Agatha Harkness
ability: Agatha starts in your hand and plays your cards for you.

name: Agent Coulson
ability: On Reveal: Add a random 4-Cost and 5-Cost card to your hand.

name: Arnim Zola
ability: On Reveal: Destroy a random friendly card here. Add copies of it to the other locations.

name: Baron Mordo
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent draws a card. Set its Cost to 6.

name: Beast
ability: On Reveal: Return your other cards at this location to your hand. They cost 1 less.

name: Black Bolt
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent must discard the lowest-Cost card in their hand.

name: Black Cat
ability: If this is in your hand at the end of your turn, discard it.

name: Black Widow
ability: On Reveal: Add a Widow’s Bite to your opponent’s hand.

name: Brood
ability: On Reveal: Add 2 Broodlings to this location with the same Power.

name: Captain Marvel
ability: At the end of the game, move to a location that wins you the game. (If possible)

name: Cerebro
ability: Ongoing: Your highest Power cards get +2 Power.

name: Colleen Wing
ability: On Reveal: Discard the lowest-cost card from your hand.

name: Crossbones
ability: You can only play this at locations where you are winning.

name: Crystal
ability: On Reveal: If this is at the middle location, shuffle your hand into your deck and draw 3 cards.

name: Dagger
ability: When this moves to a location, +2 Power for each card your opponent has there.

name: Daredevil
ability: On turn 5, you get to see your opponent’s plays before you make your own.

name: Deadpool
ability: When this is destroyed, return it to your hand with double the Power.

name: Death
ability: Costs 1 less for each card destroyed this game.

name: Debrii
ability: On Reveal: Add a Rock to each other location, for both players.

name: Destroyer
ability: On Reveal: Destroy your other cards.

name: Doctor Doom
ability: On Reveal: Add a 5-Power DoomBot to each other location.

name: Doctor Octopus
ability: On Reveal: Pull 4 random cards from your opponent’s hand to their side of this location.

name: Dracula
ability: At the end of the game, discard a card from your hand. This has its Power.

name: Drax
ability: On Reveal: If your opponent played a card here this turn, +3 Power.

name: Electro
ability: On Reveal: +1 Max Energy. Ongoing: You can only play 1 card a turn.

name: Falcon
ability: On Reveal: Return your 1-Cost cards to your hand.

name: Gambit
ability: On Reveal: Discard a card from your hand. Destroy a random enemy card.

name: Ghost Rider
ability: On Reveal: Bring back one of your discarded cards to this location.

name: Giganto
ability: You can only play this at the left location.

name: Goose
ability: Ongoing: Nobody can play cards that cost 4, 5, or 6 at this location.

name: Green Goblin
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent gains control of this.

name: Hazmat
ability: On Reveal: Afflict all other cards with -1 Power.

name: Hela
ability: On Reveal: Resurrect all cards you discarded from your hand to random locations.

name: Helicarrier
ability: When you discard this from your hand, add 3 random cards to your hand.

name: Hellcow
ability: On Reveal: Discard 2 cards from your hand.

name: Human Torch
ability: When this moves, double its Power.

name: Invisible Woman
ability: Ongoing: Cards you play here are not revealed until the game ends.

name: Jane Foster Mighty Thor
ability: On Reveal: Draw all cards that Cost 0 from your deck.

name: Juggernaut
ability: On Reveal: If your opponent played cards here this turn, move them randomly.

name: Kingpin
ability: When a card moves here on turn 6, destroy it.

name: Leader
ability: On Reveal: Copy all cards your opponent played to the location right of here, but on your side.

name: Lockjaw
ability: After you play a card here, swap it with a card in your deck.

name: Luke Cage
ability: Ongoing: Your cards can’t have their Power reduced.

name: Magik
ability: You can’t play this on turn 6. On Reveal: Change this location to ’{card.Location_Morphed.Name}’.

name: Magneto
ability: On Reveal: Move all opposing 3 and 4-Cost cards to this location.

name: Maria Hill
ability: On Reveal: Add a random 1-Cost card to your hand.

name: Maximus
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent draws 2 cards.

name: Miles Morales
ability: If a card moved last turn, this costs 1.

name: Mister Negative
ability: On Reveal: Swap the Power and Cost of all cards in your deck.

name: Mojo
ability: Ongoing: If both players have 4 cards at this location, +6 Power.

name: Moon Knight
ability: On Reveal: Discard a card from each player’s hand.

name: Mysterio
ability: As you play this, play Illusions to other locations. Disguise this as an Illusion until the game ends.

name: Mystique
ability: On Reveal: If the last card you played has an Ongoing ability, this card gains it.

name: Nick Fury
ability: On Reveal: Add 3 random 6-Cost cards to your hand.

name: Omega Red
ability: Ongoing: If you’re ahead by 10 Power here, +4 Power to other locations.

name: Patriot
ability: Ongoing: Your cards with no abilities have +2 Power.

name: Polaris
ability: On Reveal: Move an opposing 1 or 2-Cost card to this location.

name: Psylocke
ability: On Reveal: Next turn, you get +1 Energy.

name: Quake
ability: On Reveal: If this is at the middle location, swap the positions of each location.

name: Quinjet
ability: Ongoing: Cards that didn’t start in your deck cost 1 less.

name: Red Skull
ability: Ongoing: Enemy cards at this location have +2 Power.

name: Rescue
ability: On Reveal: If you play a card here next turn, +5 Power.

name: Rockslide
ability: On Reveal: Shuffle 2 Rocks into your opponent’s deck.

name: Rogue
ability: On Reveal: Steal an Ongoing ability from a random enemy card at this location.

name: Ronan the Accuser
ability: Ongoing: +2 Power for each card in your opponent’s hand.

name: Sera
ability: Ongoing: Cards in your hand cost 1 less. (minimum 1)

name: She-Hulk
ability: Costs 1 less for each unspent Energy last turn.

name: Spider-Man
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent can’t play cards at this location next turn.

name: Taskmaster
ability: On Reveal: Set this card’s Power equal to the Power of the last card you played.

name: The Hood
ability: On Reveal: Add a Demon to your hand.

name: Thor
ability: On Reveal: Shuffle Mjolnir into your deck.

name: Titania
ability: After ANY card is played here, this card switches sides.

name: Typhoid Mary
ability: Ongoing: Your other cards have -1 Power.

name: Ultron
ability: On Reveal: Create four 1-Power Drones at each other location.

name: Venom
ability: On Reveal: Destroy your other cards at this location. Add their Power to this card.

name: Viper
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent gains control of one of your other cards at this location.

name: Wave
ability: On Reveal: Next turn, cards in both players’ hands cost 4.

name: Wong
ability: Ongoing: Your On Reveal abilities at this location happen twice.

name: Yellowjacket
ability: On Reveal: Afflict your other cards at this location with -1 Power.

name: Zero
ability: On Reveal: Remove the abilities on the next card you play.
